privileged_info_summary: Verified that all 5 expected files (SF312_Nondisclosure_Agreement.txt, FY2024_Revenue_Budget.csv, backup_authorized_keys, employee_contacts.vcf, incident_response_plan.md) are synthetically generated directly by setup_task.sh in the source directory /home/ga/Documents/SensitiveData. Verified that the expected volume path is /home/ga/Volumes/secure_archive.hc and requires the password SecureMigration2024! to be successfully evaluated by export_result.sh. Verified that the checksums ground truth is stored securely in /var/lib/veracrypt_task/ground_truth_checksums.sha256 and the report path is exactly /home/ga/Documents/migration_report.txt.
